focus_hypotheses: мғҒлӢЁ name header bleedлЎң `last_name`мқҙ лқјлІЁ мЎ°к°ҒмңјлЎң мҳӨм—јлҗ  л•Ң, мӢ лў° к°ҖлҠҘн•ң `applicant_name` кө¬мЎ° priorлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ withholding мқҙлҰ„кө° exact/CER/WERлҘј нҡҢліөн•  к°ҖлҠҘм„ұмқҙ к°ҖмһҘ лҶ’лӢӨ.

Apostille `issued_on` spacing-lossлҠ” parser normalizationліҙлӢӨ region OCR box/м „мІҳлҰ¬ fallbackмқҙ н•„мҡ”н•  мҲҳ мһҲмңјлҜҖлЎң, probeм—җм„ң л°•мҠӨ нҷ•мһҘкіј м Җнҷ”м§Ҳ м „мІҳлҰ¬ нӣ„ліҙлҘј лЁјм Җ кі„лҹү кІҖмҰқн•ңлӢӨ.

changes.summary: мғҒлӢЁ мўҢмёЎ name rowм—җм„ң `last_name` cropмқҙ `tast Name\nCHEN`мІҳлҹј лқјлІЁ мЎ°к°Ғм—җ мҳӨм—јлҗ  л•Ң, clean `applicant_name`м—җм„ң мң лҸ„н•ң last-nameмқ„ мҡ°м„ н•ҳлҠ” rescueлҘј м¶”к°Җн–Ҳкі  semi-real probeм—җм„ң applicant_name/last_nameмқ„ ліөкө¬н–ҲлӢӨ.

North Carolina apostille н•ҳлӢЁ 3к°ң rowм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ box expansionкіј autocontrast/binarize/sharpen нӣ„ліҙлҘј probeм—җ мһ¬м Ғмҡ©н–Ҳм§Җл§Ң, semi-real м Җнҷ”м§Ҳ probeм—җм„ңлҠ” `s`, `ME`, `Reng.Sere Ce` мҲҳмӨҖмқҳ OCR л¶•кҙҙл§Ң нҷ•мқёлҸј lightweight region-OCR fallbackмқҖ мң м§Җ нӣ„ліҙм—җм„ң м ңмҷён–ҲлӢӨ.
мғҲ parser candidateлҘј `current_top_left_header_bleed_fix`лЎң мҠ№кІ©н•ҳкі  snapshotмқҙ мөңмӢ  internal summaryмҷҖ baseline comparison artifactлҘј к°ҖлҰ¬нӮӨлҸ„лЎқ к°ұмӢ н–ҲлӢӨ.

baseline_comparison.note: Official replayлҠ” baselineкіј лҸҷмқјн•ң 1.0 / 0.0 / 0.0мқ„ мң м§Җн–Ҳкі  regressed fieldк°Җ м—ҶлӢӨ.

apostille_region_ocr_diagnostic.note: Wide region expansion recovers partial context on the clean base sample but the semi-real low-resolution probe still produces only gibberish (`s`, `ME`, `Reng.Sere Ce`) across region and preprocessing candidates, so lightweight region-OCR fallback is not a maintainable keep candidate.

date_regression.note: Official replay comparisonм—җм„ң regressed_fieldsк°Җ л№„м–ҙ мһҲкі  date кі„м—ҙ exact/CER/WER ліҖнҷ”к°Җ м—ҶлӢӨ.

artifacts.command: PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -m scripts.evals.run_semi_real_probe_eval --manifest evals/semi_real_probes/manifest.json --suite-output-root tmp/taxonomy_gap_probe_fix_suite --actual-output-dir tmp/taxonomy_gap_probe_fix_actual --report-output evals/reports/taxonomy_gap_probe_fix_report.json --summary-output evals/reports/taxonomy_gap_probe_fix_summary.json --metadata-output evals/reports/taxonomy_gap_probe_fix_metadata.json --case-id apostille_issued_on_spacing_probe --case-id withholding_top_left_name_header_bleed_probe
